name: saferoute-ai
description: Explainable fraud-detection API gateway for fintech — rule-based risk scoring, microservices, structured persistence

scripts.dev:backend: concurrently -k -n GW,FRAUD,PAY,ACC,VER -c cyan,magenta,green,blue,yellow "nodemon backend/gateway/server.js" "nodemon backend/fraud-service/server.js" "nodemon backend/services/payment-service.js" "nodemon backend/services/account-service.js" "nodemon backend/services/verification-service.js"

author: SafeRoute AI Team
